steps.title: Set up and simplify the fraction
steps.content:
Apply the percentage formula to find what percent 828,000 is of 900,000:
$$\frac{828,000}{900,000} \times 100$$
Cancel the thousands and simplify by dividing both numerator and denominator by their GCD of 36:
$$\frac{828}{900} = \frac{23}{25}$$

steps.title: Convert the fraction to percentage
steps.content:
Convert $\frac{23}{25}$ to a percentage by multiplying numerator and denominator by 4:
$$\frac{23}{25} = \frac{92}{100} = 92\%$$
D is correct.
